content.speakerText: Good morning! Could you help me find the remote-controlled cars?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好！你能帮我找找遥控汽车吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! They're in aisle 4, near the racing track.
Sure thing—right next to the battery station.
I'll take you there. They're on the right side of the store.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确引导顾客到目标商品位置
语言准确性：使用了恰当的方向词和礼貌表达（'Of course', 'I'll take you'）
表达自然度：语调友好，符合家长与店员的日常互动场景
